sourceRefs: DRAFT — c1.2 theme unit on les échanges: la francophonie and its institutions (OIF, rayonnement, partenariat), the Lumières as historic root, emerging powers and trade, and the decoding of diplomatic speech (discussions franches / échange de vues approfondi / suivre avec attention as coded formulas). Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego 5 C1>C2 (Hachette), Dossier 7 'Échanges' (francophonie, nouvelles puissances; 'synthétiser une conférence' oral thread). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
